transcription._comment: Model options: base (fastest, ~150MB), small (~500MB), medium (~1.5GB), large-v2/v3 (~3GB). Language: 'auto' for automatic detection (recommended for multi-language), 'en' for English-only (forces English transcription, may misinterpret other languages)

response._comment: When true, flagged transcript responses include audio_data (base64 WAV) for Discord webhook attachments

llm_profanity._comment: LLM profanity detection. Providers: 'openai', 'anthropic', 'ollama'. For Ollama: provider='ollama', api_key='http://localhost:11434' (or empty for default), model='llama2' (or any pulled model). strictness: 'strict' (only severe), 'medium' (default), 'lenient' (obvious only). Make sure Ollama is running and model is pulled (e.g., 'ollama pull llama2').

console._comment: console.log_transcripts: Show recent transcripts in console status. console.live_display: Enable live updating console status (set to false to disable and reduce console spam)
